name: Olive Garden Capellini Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh angel hair pasta, cook
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Sauté onions, carrots, and broccoli for 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, squash, and garlic; sauté for 2 minutes longer.
4. Add remaining ingredients, stirring well and bringing to a simmer.
5. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender and flavors are well-blended.
6. Serve over cooked pasta.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top and serve.
